pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh code analysis
Evaluation of minimum file size for Weasis PNG exports

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated CT DICOM data simulating an irregular lobulated lesion (PatientID: POLY001). The expected output path for the polygon area measurement screenshot is /home/ga/DICOM/exports/polygon_area.png, and the file must be larger than 5000 bytes, which is a plausible minimum size for an annotated Weasis PNG export.
